name: Slime Mold
description: Physarum polycephalum — maze-solving network intelligence without neurons, brain, or central processing. Optimizes nutrient transport networks that independently rediscover human-engineered infrastructure (Tokyo rail, motorway systems). Pulsatile cytoplasmic flow encodes memory through tube diameter reinforcement. A living proof that intelligence requires neither neurons nor centralization.

core_attributes.pattern: acellular network optimization, pulsatile memory encoding, infrastructure emergence
